about.title: About Mr.FOX
about.subtitle: Mr.FOX builds Platforms and Mobile Applications for the Creator Economy Ecosystem

vision.label: Vision
vision.headline: Creators earn directly from their fans
vision.body: Build an ecosystem where Creators earn directly from fans through scalable standard platforms
highlights: One ecosystem spanning Vote · Gift · Live · Chat
Creators own their community and revenue
Scale from a single app to many platform types

mission.label: Mission
mission.headline: A data-driven engine for growth
mission.body: Develop data-driven Showcase + Engine — scale from 10 to 100+ apps by adding database records only
highlights: Standard templates for every use case
Full CMS / Back Office for content teams
Scale without rebuilding the core architecture

response.title: Response time
response.desc: We typically reply within 2–3 business days. For urgent app issues, choose Support as the subject.

steps.title: Send your message
steps.description: Fill out the form and pick the subject that best matches your inquiry.

steps.title: We receive it
steps.description: Your message reaches the Mr.FOX team and is logged for follow-up.

steps.title: Routed to the right team
steps.description: We assign Business, Partnership, Support, or General based on your subject.

steps.title: Reply by email
steps.description: Our team responds within 2–3 business days (Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00).

faq.question: How long until I hear back?
faq.answer: Usually within 2–3 business days. For urgent app issues, choose Support as the subject or call 02-9575771 ext. 75 during business hours.

faq.question: What's the fastest way to reach you?
faq.answer: Call or email support@mrfox.com during business hours, Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00. For app issues, select Support in the form.

faq.question: What's the difference between Support and Business?
faq.answer: Support is for app usage, accounts, and existing services. Business Inquiry is for organizations or brands interested in using the Mr.FOX platform or consulting on new projects.

legal.privacyIntro: Mr.FOX is committed to protecting your personal data under applicable privacy laws (PDPA).
legal.termsIntro: By using the Mr.FOX Showcase website, you agree to these terms.
legal.dataCollectionBody: We collect information when you contact us or use the CMS — no payment data is stored on Showcase.
legal.usageBody: Showcase content is informational. Real transactions happen in the separate Engine app.
legal.contactBody: For privacy inquiries, please use the Contact page.
